parsed.recommendation_text: For office work, the Sony WH-1000XM5 offers top-tier noise cancellation and sound quality at a premium price. Its lightweight build ensures comfort during long hours of use, making it ideal for an office setting. While its non-foldable design is less travel-friendly, the XM5's superior audio performance and noise isolation make it stand out in this category.
parsed.selection_rationale: Best noise cancellation and sound quality; comfortable for extended wear.
